title: Great White attaches Sharkling under source on summon

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: This creature can only be summoned by placing "Sharkling" under this card on the field. If this card is removed from the field, changes control, or is killed, "Sharkling" follows it.

plan.title: Great White attaches Sharkling under source on summon
plan.summary: Resolve Great White summon and verify the ON_SUMMON attachment branch places Sharkling under Great White.

notes: Great White ON_SUMMON effect attaches Sharkling under this card after the requirement is paid.

steps: Confirm Sharkling is not in cemetery.

expectedAssertions.label: Sharkling is attached under Great White
Sharkling is not sent to cemetery as a normal sacrifice

manualVerification: The attached Sharkling should remain linked to Great White for leave-field/change-control/death cleanup.
riskNotes: This fixture focuses on 020-E02 after the requirement has been paid.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_020_great_white-020-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
